response.justification: Strong full-stack fundamentals with 16+ years of experience, proven React and Node.js expertise, and current hands-on AI agent development work. However, Nest.js and specific testing frameworks (Vitest/Jest) are not explicitly demonstrated, and the very recent role change warrants clarification. Core capabilities and learning velocity suggest a strong candidate who can quickly adapt to the primary stack.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB matching core requirements
Active AI agent development at current role (MCP, agentic workflows) directly addresses required skill
Deep testing and TDD culture evident across roles with multiple testing framework libraries and workshops
concerns: Nest.js not mentioned despite being primary backend framework; experience primarily with Node.js/Express-style architectures
Vitest and Jest not explicitly listed; testing background relies on custom frameworks rather than industry-standard tools
Very recent job change (2 months at re:cinq) raises questions about stability and primary role focus

key_factors.factor: Nest.js and testing framework expertise gaps
